settings.text: DimenAI helps merchants offer accurate shipping rates and ship orders efficiently with AI-powered 3D bin packing and multi-carrier integration.

settings.icon_svg: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 16V8a2 2 0 0 0-1-1.73l-7-4a2 2 0 0 0-2 0l-7 4A2 2 0 0 0 3 8v8a2 2 0 0 0 1 1.73l7 4a2 2 0 0 0 2 0l7-4A2 2 0 0 0 21 16z"></path><polyline points="3.27 6.96 12 12.01 20.73 6.96"></polyline><line x1="12" y1="22.08" x2="12" y2="12"></line></svg>
settings.title: AI 3D Bin Packing
settings.text: Automatically fits order items into your boxes so you use the right size and avoid oversized shipping costs.

settings.icon_svg: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="1" y="3" width="15" height="13"></rect><polygon points="16 8 20 8 23 11 23 16 16 16 16 8"></polygon><circle cx="5.5" cy="18.5" r="2.5"></circle><circle cx="18.5" cy="18.5" r="2.5"></circle></svg>
settings.title: Real-time Shipping Rates
settings.text: Show live rates from UPS, USPS, FedEx, and Australia Post at checkout and in the admin.

settings.icon_svg: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"></path><polyline points="14 2 14 8 20 8"></polyline><line x1="16" y1="13" x2="8" y2="13"></line><line x1="16" y1="17" x2="8" y2="17"></line><polyline points="10 9 9 9 8 9"></polyline></svg>
settings.title: Buy Labels Efficiently
settings.text: Review orders, see packed boxes, and buy labels without leaving the app for a streamlined workflow.

settings.icon_svg: <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"></line><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"></line></svg>
settings.title: Package Management
settings.text: Create and manage your box dimensions and weight limits; the app uses them for accurate rates and packing.

settings.title: Live Carrier Rates
settings.text: Integrate directly with major carriers to provide your customers with the most accurate shipping costs at checkout.

settings.title: Optimized Packing
settings.text: Our AI algorithm calculates the most efficient way to pack items, reducing waste and shipping expenses.

settings.title: Label Purchasing
settings.text: Save time by purchasing shipping labels directly within the app once your boxes are packed and ready.

settings.title: Ready to Optimize Your Shipping?
settings.text: Join thousands of merchants using DimenAI to save time and money on every order.
